name: Bratislava (Slovakia)

colors.symbolism: the central stripe and the city's heraldic colour

description: Three horizontal stripes — white, red, green — with the coat of arms of Bratislava centred: a yellow city gate with three towers and an open gate, on a red field.
history: Bratislava is the capital and largest city of Slovakia. Its tricolour flag and arms have been used since the medieval period.
